data.title: Rio Tinto Updates Total Voting Rights and Share Capital Structure as of Late May 2026
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Rio Tinto Limited ( (AU:RIO) ) is now available.

Rio Tinto plc reported that, as of 29 May 2026, its issued share capital comprised 1,256,038,584 ordinary shares of 10p each, with 992,389 of these held in treasury and therefore excluded from dividends and voting. This left a total of 1,255,046,195 voting rights, a key reference figure for investors and other stakeholders monitoring disclosure thresholds under U.K. transparency rules.

The company also noted the existence of a Special Voting Share and a DLC Dividend Share that support joint voting and economic alignment between Rio Tinto plc and Rio Tinto Limited within their dual-listed structure. In addition, it highlighted that 371,821,214 publicly held Rio Tinto Limited shares remain outside the plc share capital, underscoring the scale and complexity of the group’s cross-market equity base and governance framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RIO) stock is a Hold
with a A$171.50 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rio Tinto Limited stock,
see the AU:RIO Stock Forecast page.

More about Rio Tinto Limited

Rio Tinto Limited, part of the Anglo-Australian mining group Rio Tinto, operates in the global resources sector with a focus on iron ore, copper and other minerals critical to industrial and energy markets. The company is structured as part of a dual-listed companies arrangement with Rio Tinto plc, designed to align the economic interests and voting rights of shareholders across the U.K. and Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 1,292,176

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$235.3B

For an in-depth examination of RIO stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Actelis Restructures White Lion Financing with New Exchange
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Actelis Networks, Inc. ( (ASNS) ).

On April 10, 2026, Actelis Networks was delisted from the Nasdaq Capital Market, triggering a delisting-related pricing mechanism in its common stock purchase agreement with White Lion Capital. On July 1, 2026, the parties signed an Exchange and Amendment Agreement under which Actelis agreed to issue 9,850,000 shares and related warrant securities to compensate White Lion for rights tied to commitment shares and delisting penalties.

The amendment restructures White Lion’s purchase mechanisms into revised rapid and regular purchase options, setting discounted prices based on market trading with a fixed $0.005 deduction that does not adjust for any reverse stock split. Actelis also agreed to pause new purchase notices for 30 days and to reconfigure its registration statements to deregister 10,000,000 shares and newly register 6,000,000 shares plus the amendment securities, reshaping its financing flexibility while the stock remains off Nasdaq.

Spark’s Take on ASNS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ASNS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak profitability and sustained cash burn, despite improved leverage. Technicals also reflect a pronounced downtrend with negative momentum. Corporate events are mixed, with OTCQB trading and delisting-related risks offsetting potential strategic upside from the proposed acquisition and buyback expansion, while valuation metrics provided do not offer clear support.

To see Spark’s full report on ASNS stock,
click here.

More about Actelis Networks, Inc.

Actelis Networks, Inc. operates in the telecommunications and networking sector, providing solutions based on its common stock financing arrangements to support its capital needs. The company has previously relied on an equity line of credit structure with investor White Lion Capital LLC, tied to its listing status on the Nasdaq Capital Market and subsequent trading in its common stock.

Average Trading Volume: 1,601,558

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.96M

Find detailed analytics on ASNS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Box shareholders approve equity plan and board directors
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Box ( (BOX) ) has shared an update.

On June 25, 2026, Box, Inc. held its annual meeting of stockholders, where investors approved an amendment to the company’s Amended and Restated 2015 Equity Incentive Plan to add 7,200,000 shares of Class A common stock reserved for issuance. Stockholders also ratified Ernst & Young LLP as independent auditor for the fiscal year ending January 31, 2027, with strong participation representing 83.30% of eligible voting power, underscoring broad shareholder engagement in Box’s governance and compensation structure.

At the same meeting, shareholders elected three Class III directors—Sue Barsamian, Jack Lazar, and Steve Murphy—to terms running until the 2029 annual meeting, reinforcing continuity on the board. Investors further approved, on an advisory basis, the compensation of the company’s named executive officers, and backed the expanded equity plan despite a significant minority opposing it, indicating mixed but ultimately supportive sentiment toward Box’s use of stock-based incentives to attract and retain talent.

The most recent analyst rating on (BOX) stock is a Buy
with a $37.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Box stock,
see the BOX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BOX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BOX is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong cash flow and improved profitability, supported by upbeat guidance and margin/FCF momentum from the latest earnings call. The main constraints are balance-sheet leverage and only modest TTM revenue growth, while technicals are moderately supportive and valuation appears reasonable on the provided P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on BOX stock,
click here.

More about Box

Box, Inc. is a cloud content management company that provides software and services for secure file storage, collaboration, and workflow automation, primarily targeting enterprises that need to manage and share content across geographically dispersed teams and regulated industries.

data.title: Perspective Therapeutics Highlights Progress in Alpha Radiopharmaceutical Pipeline
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Perspective Therapeutics ( (CATX) ) is now available.

On July 1, 2026, Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. updated its corporate presentation to highlight progress on its 212Pb-based radiopharmaceutical pipeline and integrated manufacturing strategy. The company emphasized its theranostic approach, targeting solid tumors with next-generation alpha therapies, and positioning itself to expand its addressable market through regional daily production and direct-to-hospital delivery.

The update detailed multiple ongoing Phase 1/2a trials, including VMT-α-NET for SSTR2-positive neuroendocrine tumors, VMT01 for melanoma, and PSV359 for FAP-α–expressing solid tumors. Early data indicated deepening and durable responses, favorable safety and tolerability, and improved tumor retention, supporting further development and potential registration pathways, while underscoring a strong intellectual property portfolio across the radiopharmaceutical value chain.

The most recent analyst rating on (CATX) stock is a Buy
with a $11.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Perspective Therapeutics stock,
see the CATX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CATX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CATX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (very small revenue, large losses, and heavy cash burn) despite a strong, low-leverage balance sheet. Technical indicators are neutral-to-weak with the stock below key moving averages. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend, while recent corporate updates provide some offset through positive clinical and operational progress.

To see Spark’s full report on CATX stock,
click here.

More about Perspective Therapeutics

Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. operates in the oncology radiopharmaceuticals sector, developing next-generation alpha-emitting therapies based on the isotope 212Pb. The company focuses on targeted treatments for solid tumors, including neuroendocrine tumors, melanoma, and other advanced cancers, supported by integrated isotope production and regional manufacturing for direct-to-hospital supply.

data.title: UTG Shareholders Reaffirm Board and Executive Compensation
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

UTG ( (UTGN) ) has provided an announcement.

At its June 30, 2026 annual meeting, UTG, Inc. shareholders voted on the election of seven directors, with each nominee, including Jesse T. Correll and Preston H. Correll, receiving 2,266,631 votes in favor, 282 votes withheld and 173,642 broker non-votes. Shareholders also cast a non-binding advisory vote on the compensation of the company’s named executive officers, approving the pay package with 2,264,995 votes in favor, 510 against and 1,408 abstentions, signaling broad investor support for existing leadership and compensation practices.

The results underscore continuity in UTG’s board composition, as all seven director nominees were effectively confirmed by an overwhelming majority of votes cast. The strong backing for executive compensation suggests that shareholders are generally satisfied with the company’s governance and management alignment, which may support stability in strategic direction and reassure investors about oversight of executive pay policies.

More about UTG

UTG, Inc. operates in the financial sector and is structured with a board of directors overseeing corporate governance and executive compensation. The company maintains a formal shareholder governance framework in which directors stand for election and executive pay practices are subject to advisory shareholder votes at its annual meetings.

Average Trading Volume: 534

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $174.2M

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Banca Sistema S.p.A. ( (IT:BST) ).

Banca Sistema’s board has approved a merger plan for the incorporation of parent company Banca CF+ S.p.A. into Banca Sistema, following a positive opinion from its Internal Control, Risk Management and Sustainability Committee acting as the related-party transactions body. The information document on this related-party merger has been published for investors and stakeholders at the bank’s Milan headquarters, on its website and via the authorized storage mechanism, marking a governance step that could streamline the group’s structure and consolidate oversight within the banking group.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:BST) stock is a Buy

More about Banca Sistema S.p.A.

Banca Sistema S.p.A., founded in 2011 and listed on the Euronext Star Milan segment since 2015, is a specialized financial institution focused on purchasing trade and tax receivables, particularly from the Public Administration. The bank supports corporate liquidity and operates across sectors such as soccer, entertainment, healthcare and public administration in Italy, Spain and Portugal, while also offering retail lending, banking services and receivables servicing.

data.title: CARE places Aavas Financiers on rating watch amid senior exits
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Aavas Financiers Ltd. ( (IN:AAVAS) ) has shared an update.

CARE Ratings has placed Aavas Financiers’ long-term bank facilities and non-convertible debentures, totalling about ₹13,522 crore, on rating watch with developing implications. The action follows a series of senior leadership changes, including recent resignations of the chief financial officer and chief risk officer, and earlier exits of the managing director and chief executive officer and chief business officer.

Interim replacements have been appointed, and CARE will monitor the stability of the new management team and its impact on growth and asset quality. The agency also noted the company’s rebuttal of negative media reports related to a National Housing Bank refinance audit, while affirming that Aavas retains healthy profitability, comfortable asset quality, strong liquidity and adequate capitalisation, albeit with risks from geographic concentration and a vulnerable borrower base.

More about Aavas Financiers Ltd.

Aavas Financiers Ltd. is a housing finance company focused on retail home loans, primarily serving borrowers in semi-urban and rural regions. The lender targets customers with relatively modest income profiles, which offers growth potential but also exposes it to higher sensitivity during economic downturns.

Average Trading Volume: 50,591

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 120.7B INR

Learn more about AAVAS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Norsk Titanium AS ( (DE:84F) ) just unveiled an update.

Norsk Titanium AS has issued a new grant of 23,993,998 restricted share units and performance shares under its long-term incentive programme, equivalent to 2.07% of its outstanding share capital. The move underscores the company’s use of equity-based rewards to retain key staff and align management interests with shareholders as it pursues growth in metal 3D printing markets.

The restricted share units will vest over three years on a time-based schedule, while the performance shares will vest after 2028 depending on financial and operational targets set by the board. Significant allocations were made to primary insiders, highlighting the board’s focus on incentivising top leadership, which may support long-term execution of Norsk Titanium’s strategy in aerospace, defence and industrial applications.

More about Norsk Titanium AS

Norsk Titanium AS is a global leader in metal 3D printing, specialising in its proprietary Rapid Plasma Deposition (RPD) technology to produce value-added metal parts. With 700 MT of production capacity, the company targets commercial aerospace, defence and industrial markets, offering customers cost-efficient components that reduce raw material use, energy consumption and environmental impact compared with traditional metal forming.

data.title: Juventus Secures Long-Term Signing of Jeff Ekhator from Genoa
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Juventus Football Club Spa ( (IT:JUVE) ) has provided an update.

Juventus has agreed with Genoa CFC to permanently acquire the registration rights of midfielder Jeff Osayuki Ekhator for €16 million, payable over three financial years, plus €0.4 million in additional charges. The deal also includes performance-related bonuses up to €2 million and a contract with the player running until 30 June 2031, underscoring Juventus’s strategy of long-term squad investment and potential value creation in the transfer market.

The structure of the transaction, with staged payments and conditional bonuses, reflects a measured approach to financial planning while strengthening the team’s sporting assets. By locking in Ekhator on a five-year deal, Juventus signals confidence in his contribution to future competitive performance, which could impact both on-field results and the club’s balance sheet through amortized transfer costs and potential resale value.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:JUVE) stock is a Hold
with a EUR2.35 price target.

see the IT:JUVE Stock Forecast page.

More about Juventus Football Club Spa

Juventus Football Club S.p.A. is a leading Italian professional football club competing in Serie A and European competitions, generating revenue primarily from match operations, broadcasting rights, sponsorships, merchandising, and player trading within the global football industry.
